sqlMap.select: SELECT ISMAILRECEIVE, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
SELECT MEMBERID FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_MEMBERID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISMAILRECEIVE = #isMailReceive#, LISTCNT = #listCnt#, ISPREVIEW = #isPreview#, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #previewListValue#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #previewContentValue# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = 0 WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = 2, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #v_CONTENT#, LISTCNT = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET ISPREVIEW = 1, PREVIEWLISTVALUE = #v_LIST#, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE = #v_CONTENT#, LISTCNT = #v_LISTCNT# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#

insert.isEqual: INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, ISMAILRECEIVE, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, 0 ,#v_LISTCNT#, 0, 50, 50, #v_TENANTID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, ISMAILRECEIVE, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, 0, #v_LISTCNT#, 2, #v_LIST#, #v_CONTENT#, #v_TENANTID# )

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, ISMAILRECEIVE, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, PREVIEWLISTVALUE, PREVIEWCONTENTVALUE, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, 0, #v_LISTCNT#, 1, #v_LIST#, #v_CONTENT#, #v_TENANTID# )

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION SET LISTCNT = #v_LISTCOUNT#, ISPREVIEW = #v_PREVIEW# WHERE TENANTID = #v_TENANTID# AND MEMBERID = #v_USERID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_OPTION ( MEMBERID, LISTCNT, ISPREVIEW, TENANTID ) VALUES ( #v_USERID#, #v_LISTCOUNT#, #v_PREVIEW#, #v_TENANTID# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CIRCULARID, A.IMPORTANCE, A.HASFILE, A.STATUS, A.TITLE, A.MEMBERID, A.REGDATE, B.STATUS AS CONFIRMSTATUS, B.CONFIRMDATE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A, TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B WHERE A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID AND A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID AND B.MEMBERID = #memberId# AND A.TENANTID = #tenantId# LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#

SELECT A.CIRCULARID, A.IMPORTANCE, A.HASFILE, A.STATUS, A.TITLE, A.MEMBERID, A.REGDATE, B.STATUS AS CONFIRMSTATUS, B.CONFIRMDATE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A, TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B WHERE A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID AND A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID AND B.MEMBERID = #memberId# AND A.TENANTID = #tenantId# LIMIT #limit#, #rowCount#
SELECT COUNT(A.CIRCULARID) CNT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR A, TBL_CIRCULAR_USER B WHERE A.CIRCULARID = B.CIRCULARID AND A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID AND B.MEMBERID = #memberId# AND A.TENANTID = #tenantId#
SELECT CIRCULARID, IMPORTANCE, HASFILE, STATUS, TITLE, MEMBERID, REGDATE, OPTION, CONTENT FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
SELECT COUNT(CIRCULARID) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE UPDATESTATUS = 1 AND CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
SELECT COUNT(CIRCULARID) FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
SELECT MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2 FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR (CIRCULARID, TITLE, IMPORTANCE, OPTION, CONTENT, HASFILE, STATUS, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, REGDATE, ENDDATE, TENANTID) VALUES (#circularID#, #title#, #importance#, #option#, #content#, #hasFile#, #status#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #regDate#, #endDate#, #tenantID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_USER (CIRCULARUSERID, CIRCULARID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, STATUS, CONFIRMDATE, UPDATESTATUS, TENANTID) VALUES (#circularUserID# ,#circularID#, #memberID#, #memberName#, #memberName2#, #status#, #confirmDate#, #updateStatus#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET TITLE = #title#, IMPORTANCE = #importance#, OPTION = #option#, CONTENT = #content# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET UPDATESTATUS = '1' WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND MEMBERID = #memberID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR SET STATUS = #status# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_USER SET CONFIRMDATE = #confirmDate# WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_USER WHERE CIRCULARID = #circularID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER ( CIRCULARBMID, MEMBERID, MEMBERNAME, MEMBERNAME2, TENANTID ) select #v_CIRCULARBMID#, cn, displayname, displayname2, tenant_id from tbl_usermaster where cn = #v_MEMBERID# and tenant_id = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT A.CIRCULARBMID, A.TITLE, A.REGDATE, concat ((select membername FROM tbl_circular_bmuser where circularBMId = A.CIRCULARBMID ORDER BY circularBMUserId limit 1),'/', (select count(*) - 1 from tbl_circular_bmuser where circularBMId = A.CIRCULARBMID )) memberName FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM A WHERE A.MEMBERID = #memberId# AND A.TENANTID = #tenantId#
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(membername ORDER BY circularBMUserId separator ', ') FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BMUSER WHERE CIRCULARBMID = #v_CIRCULARBMID# AND TENANTID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CIRCULAR_BM WHERE CIRCULARBMID = #circularBMId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_BM SET TITLE = #title# WHERE CIRCULARBMID = #circularBMId# AND TENANTID = #tenantId# AND MEMBERID = #memberId#
